# frontend\src\app\features\dashboard\shell\dashboard-shell.html

```html
<!-- dashboard-shell.html -->
<div class="shell" [class.shell--collapsed]="sidebarCollapsed()">

  <!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
       BACKDROP MOBILE
       ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
  @if (mobileMenuOpen()) {
    <div class="sidebar-backdrop" (click)="closeMobileMenu()" aria-hidden="true"></div>
  }

  <!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
       SIDEBAR
       ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
  <aside class="sidebar" [class.sidebar--open]="mobileMenuOpen()" role="navigation">

    <!-- ── Logo + bouton collapse ─────────────────────────────── -->
    <div class="sidebar__logo">
      <a
        routerLink="/dashboard"
        class="sidebar__logo-link"
        aria-label="FeedxAI — accueil"
        (click)="closeMobileMenu()">
        @if (sidebarCollapsed()) {
          <img class="sidebar__logo-icon sidebar__logo-icon--sm"
               src="assets/feedxai-logo.svg" alt="FeedxAI" />
        } @else {
          <img class="sidebar__logo-icon"
               src="assets/feedxai.svg" alt="FeedxAI" />
        }
      </a>

      @if (!sidebarCollapsed()) {
        <button
          class="sidebar__collapse-btn"
          type="button"
          aria-label="Réduire la sidebar"
          (click)="toggleSidebar()">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none" stroke="currentColor"
               stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true">
            <polyline points="10 4 6 8 10 12"/>
          </svg>
        </button>
      }
    </div>

    <!-- ── Project Switcher ───────────────────────────────────── -->
    <app-project-switcher></app-project-switcher>

    <!-- ── Navigation principale ─────────────────────────────── -->
    <nav class="sidebar__nav" aria-label="Navigation principale">
      @if (!sidebarCollapsed()) {
        <p class="sidebar__nav-label">Navigation</p>
      }

      @for (item of navItems; track item.path) {
        <a
          [routerLink]="item.path"
          routerLinkActive="sidebar__nav-item--active"
          [routerLinkActiveOptions]="{ exact: item.path === '/dashboard' }"
          class="sidebar__nav-item"
          [class.sidebar__nav-item--collapsed]="sidebarCollapsed()"
          [title]="sidebarCollapsed() ? item.label : ''"
          (click)="closeMobileMenu()">

          <span class="sidebar__nav-icon" aria-hidden="true">
            <ng-container [ngSwitch]="item.icon">
              <ng-container *ngSwitchCase="'home'">
                <svg viewBox="0 0 20 20" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
                  <path d="M3 9.5L10 3l7 6.5V17a1 1 0 0 1-1 1H4a1 1 0 0 1-1-1V9.5z"/>
                  <path d="M7 18V12h6v6"/>
                </svg>
              </ng-container>
              <ng-container *ngSwitchCase="'folder'">
                <svg viewBox="0 0 20 20" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
                  <path d="M18 15.5a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H4a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V4.5a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h4l2 2.5h8a2 2 0 0 1 2 2z"/>
                </svg>
              </ng-container>
              <ng-container *ngSwitchCase="'messages'">
                <svg viewBox="0 0 20 20" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
                  <path d="M18 13a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H6l-4 4V5a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h12a2 2 0 0 1 2 2v8z"/>
                </svg>
              </ng-container>
              <ng-container *ngSwitchCase="'chart'">
                <svg viewBox="0 0 20 20" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
                  <polyline points="18 10 15 10 12.5 17.5 7.5 2.5 5 10 2 10"/>
                </svg>
              </ng-container>
              <ng-container *ngSwitchCase="'code'">
                <svg viewBox="0 0 20 20" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
                  <polyline points="13 15 18 10 13 5"/>
                  <polyline points="7 5 2 10 7 15"/>
                </svg>
              </ng-container>
            </ng-container>
          </span>

          @if (!sidebarCollapsed()) {
            <span class="sidebar__nav-label-text">{{ item.label }}</span>
            @if (item.badge && item.badge > 0) {
              <span class="sidebar__nav-badge">{{ item.badge }}</span>
            }
          }

        </a>
      }
    </nav>

    <!-- ── Spacer ─────────────────────────────────────────────── -->
    <div class="sidebar__spacer"></div>

    <!-- ── Quota bar ──────────────────────────────────────────── -->
    @if (!sidebarCollapsed() && quota()) {
      <div
        class="sidebar__quota"
        [class.sidebar__quota--warning]="quotaPercent() >= 80 && quotaPercent() < 95"
        [class.sidebar__quota--danger]="quotaPercent() >= 95">

        <div class="sidebar__quota-row">
          <span class="sidebar__quota-text">Feedbacks ce mois</span>
          <span class="sidebar__quota-count">
            {{ quota()!.usagePercent }}<span class="sidebar__quota-sep">/</span>{{ quota()!.feedbacksLimit === -1 ? '∞' : quota()!.feedbacksLimit }}
          </span>
        </div>

        <div class="sidebar__quota-track" role="progressbar"
             [attr.aria-valuenow]="quotaPercent()"
             aria-valuemin="0" aria-valuemax="100">
          <div
            class="sidebar__quota-fill"
            [style.width.%]="quota()!.feedbacksLimit === -1 ? 0 : quotaPercent()">
          </div>
        </div>

        @if (quotaPercent() >= 80 && quota()!.feedbacksLimit !== -1) {
          <a routerLink="/dashboard/billing" class="sidebar__quota-cta">
            @if (quotaPercent() >= 95) {
              ⚠️ Limite atteinte — Upgrader →
            } @else {
              Passer au Pro →
            }
          </a>
        }

      </div>
    }

    <!-- ── Navigation secondaire ──────────────────────────────── -->
    <nav class="sidebar__nav sidebar__nav--bottom" aria-label="Navigation secondaire">
      @if (!sidebarCollapsed()) {
        <p class="sidebar__nav-label">Compte</p>
      }

      @for (item of bottomNavItems; track item.path) {
        <a
          [routerLink]="item.path"
          routerLinkActive="sidebar__nav-item--active"
          class="sidebar__nav-item"
          [class.sidebar__nav-item--collapsed]="sidebarCollapsed()"
          [title]="sidebarCollapsed() ? item.label : ''"
          (click)="closeMobileMenu()">

          <span class="sidebar__nav-icon" aria-hidden="true">
            <ng-container [ngSwitch]="item.icon">
              <ng-container *ngSwitchCase="'settings'">
                <svg viewBox="0 0 20 20" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
                  <circle cx="10" cy="10" r="2.5"/>
                  <path d="M10 2v2M10 16v2M2 10h2M16 10h2M4.2 4.2l1.4 1.4M14.4 14.4l1.4 1.4M4.2 15.8l1.4-1.4M14.4 5.6l1.4-1.4"/>
                </svg>
              </ng-container>
              <ng-container *ngSwitchCase="'help'">
                <svg viewBox="0 0 20 20" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
                  <circle cx="10" cy="10" r="8"/>
                  <path d="M7.5 7.5a2.5 2.5 0 0 1 5 0c0 2-2.5 2.5-2.5 4.5"/>
                  <circle cx="10" cy="15" r="0.5" fill="currentColor"/>
                </svg>
              </ng-container>
              <ng-container *ngSwitchCase="'billing'">
                <svg viewBox="0 0 20 20" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
                  <rect x="2" y="5" width="16" height="12" rx="2"/>
                  <path d="M2 9h16"/>
                  <path d="M6 13h2M10 13h4"/>
                </svg>
              </ng-container>
            </ng-container>
          </span>

          @if (!sidebarCollapsed()) {
            <span class="sidebar__nav-label-text">{{ item.label }}</span>
          }

        </a>
      }
    </nav>

    <!-- ── Profil utilisateur ─────────────────────────────────── -->
    <div
      class="sidebar__user"
      [class.sidebar__user--collapsed]="sidebarCollapsed()"
      [title]="sidebarCollapsed() ? (fullName() ?? '') : ''">

      <div class="sidebar__user-avatar" aria-hidden="true">
        {{ initials() }}
      </div>

      @if (!sidebarCollapsed()) {
        <div class="sidebar__user-info">
          <span class="sidebar__user-name">{{ fullName() }}</span>
          <span class="sidebar__user-plan">
            Plan {{ currentPlan() | titlecase }}
          </span>
        </div>

        <button
          class="sidebar__user-logout"
          type="button"
          aria-label="Se déconnecter"
          [disabled]="logoutLoading()"
          (click)="logout()">
          @if (logoutLoading()) {
            <span class="sidebar__logout-spinner"></span>
          } @else {
            <svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none" stroke="currentColor"
                 stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true">
              <path d="M10 3h3a1 1 0 0 1 1 1v8a1 1 0 0 1-1 1h-3"/>
              <polyline points="7 5 10 8 7 11"/>
              <line x1="10" y1="8" x2="2" y2="8"/>
            </svg>
          }
        </button>
      }

    </div>

  </aside>

  <!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
       ZONE PRINCIPALE
       ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
  <div class="shell__main">

    <!-- ── Topbar ─────────────────────────────────────────────── -->
    <header class="topbar">

      <!-- Burger mobile -->
      <button
        class="topbar__burger"
        type="button"
        aria-label="Ouvrir le menu"
        (click)="toggleMobileMenu()">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 20 20" fill="none" stroke="currentColor"
             stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true">
          <line x1="3" y1="6" x2="17" y2="6"/>
          <line x1="3" y1="10" x2="17" y2="10"/>
          <line x1="3" y1="14" x2="17" y2="14"/>
        </svg>
      </button>

      <!-- Bouton expand (sidebar collapsed, desktop) -->
      @if (sidebarCollapsed()) {
        <button
          class="topbar__expand-btn"
          type="button"
          aria-label="Agrandir la sidebar"
          (click)="toggleSidebar()">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none" stroke="currentColor"
               stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true">
            <polyline points="6 4 10 8 6 12"/>
          </svg>
        </button>
      }

      <!-- Breadcrumb -->
      <nav class="topbar__breadcrumb" aria-label="Fil d'Ariane">
        <span class="topbar__breadcrumb-root">FeedxAI</span>
        <svg class="topbar__breadcrumb-sep" viewBox="0 0 10 10" fill="none"
             stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round"
             stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true">
          <polyline points="3 2 7 5 3 8"/>
        </svg>
        @if (currentProject()) {
          <span class="topbar__breadcrumb-project">{{ currentProject()!.name }}</span>
          <svg class="topbar__breadcrumb-sep" viewBox="0 0 10 10" fill="none"
               stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round"
               stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true">
            <polyline points="3 2 7 5 3 8"/>
          </svg>
        }
        <span class="topbar__breadcrumb-current">{{ currentPageLabel() }}</span>
      </nav>

      <!-- Actions -->
      <div class="topbar__actions">
        <button class="topbar__avatar" type="button" aria-label="Menu utilisateur">
          {{ initials() }}
        </button>
      </div>

    </header>

    <!-- ── Contenu ────────────────────────────────────────────── -->
    <main class="shell__content">
      <router-outlet></router-outlet>
    </main>

  </div>

</div>
```

# frontend\src\app\features\dashboard\shell\dashboard-shell.scss

```scss
// dashboard-shell.scss
// ─── Design system : --color-dark, --color-white, --color-border,
//     --color-muted, --color-surface, --color-surface-lt,
//     --radius-inner, --radius-card, --font-medium, --font-base
// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

$sidebar-w:           240px;
$sidebar-w-collapsed:  64px;
$topbar-h:             56px;
$speed:               0.22s;
$ease:                cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1);


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// SHELL — grille principale
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

.shell {
  display: flex;
  min-height: 100vh;
  background-color: var(--color-surface-lt);
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// SIDEBAR
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

.sidebar {
  position: fixed;
  top: 0;
  left: 0;
  bottom: 0;
  width: $sidebar-w;
  background-color: var(--color-white);
  border-right: 1px solid var(--color-border);
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  z-index: 50;
  overflow: hidden;
  transition: width $speed $ease;

  .shell--collapsed & { width: $sidebar-w-collapsed; }
}

// ── Logo ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────

.sidebar__logo {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  height: $topbar-h;
  padding: 0 12px 0 16px;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--color-border);
  flex-shrink: 0;

  .shell--collapsed & {
    justify-content: center;
    padding: 0;
  }
}

.sidebar__logo-link {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 8px;
  text-decoration: none;
  overflow: hidden;
  flex: 1;
  min-width: 0;

  .shell--collapsed & { flex: none; }
}

.sidebar__logo-icon {
  width: 120px;
  height: auto;
  flex-shrink: 0;

  &--sm { width: 26px; }
}

.sidebar__collapse-btn {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  width: 28px;
  height: 28px;
  border-radius: var(--radius-inner);
  background: none;
  border: none;
  cursor: pointer;
  color: var(--color-muted);
  flex-shrink: 0;
  transition: background-color 0.15s ease, color 0.15s ease;

  svg { width: 14px; height: 14px; }

  &:hover {
    background-color: var(--color-surface-lt);
    color: var(--color-dark);
  }
}

// ── Navigation ────────────────────────────────────────────────

.sidebar__nav {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  padding: 8px;
  gap: 2px;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}

.sidebar__nav-label {
  font-size: 10px;
  font-weight: 500;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.07em;
  color: var(--color-muted);
  padding: 6px 8px 4px;
  white-space: nowrap;
  margin: 0;
}

.sidebar__nav-item {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 10px;
  height: 36px;
  padding: 0 8px;
  border-radius: var(--radius-inner);
  color: var(--color-muted);
  text-decoration: none;
  font-family: var(--font-medium);
  font-size: 13px;
  font-weight: 500;
  white-space: nowrap;
  overflow: hidden;
  transition: background-color 0.12s ease, color 0.12s ease;

  &:hover {
    background-color: var(--color-surface-lt);
    color: var(--color-dark);
  }

  &--active {
    background-color: var(--color-surface);
    color: var(--color-dark);
  }

  // Mode collapsed : icône centrée
  &--collapsed {
    justify-content: center;
    padding: 0;
    width: 40px;
    height: 40px;
    margin-inline: auto;
  }
}

.sidebar__nav-icon {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  width: 20px;
  height: 20px;
  flex-shrink: 0;

  svg { width: 16px; height: 16px; }
}

.sidebar__nav-label-text {
  flex: 1;
  overflow: hidden;
  text-overflow: ellipsis;
}

.sidebar__nav-badge {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  min-width: 18px;
  height: 18px;
  padding: 0 5px;
  border-radius: 9px;
  background-color: var(--color-dark);
  color: var(--color-white);
  font-size: 10px;
  font-weight: 600;
  flex-shrink: 0;
  line-height: 1;
}

// ── Spacer ────────────────────────────────────────────────────

.sidebar__spacer { flex: 1; }

// ── Quota bar ─────────────────────────────────────────────────

.sidebar__quota {
  margin: 0 8px 8px;
  padding: 10px 12px;
  border-radius: var(--radius-inner);
  border: 1px solid var(--color-border);
  background-color: var(--color-surface-lt);
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 7px;
  flex-shrink: 0;
  transition: border-color 0.2s ease, background-color 0.2s ease;

  &--warning {
    border-color: #FED7AA;
    background-color: #FFFBEB;
  }

  &--danger {
    border-color: #FECDD3;
    background-color: #FFF1F2;
  }
}

.sidebar__quota-row {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: 4px;
}

.sidebar__quota-text {
  font-size: 11px;
  color: var(--color-muted);
  white-space: nowrap;
}

.sidebar__quota-count {
  font-family: var(--font-medium);
  font-size: 11px;
  color: var(--color-dark);
  white-space: nowrap;
}

.sidebar__quota-sep {
  color: var(--color-muted);
  margin: 0 1px;
}

.sidebar__quota-track {
  height: 4px;
  border-radius: 2px;
  background-color: var(--color-border);
  overflow: hidden;
}

.sidebar__quota-fill {
  height: 100%;
  border-radius: 2px;
  background-color: var(--color-dark);
  transition: width 0.5s ease;

  .sidebar__quota--warning & { background-color: #F59E0B; }
  .sidebar__quota--danger &  { background-color: #EF4444; }
}

.sidebar__quota-cta {
  font-family: var(--font-medium);
  font-size: 11px;
  text-decoration: none;
  transition: opacity 0.15s ease;

  .sidebar__quota--danger &  { color: #DC2626; }
  .sidebar__quota--warning & { color: #D97706; }

  &:hover { opacity: 0.75; }
}

// ── Navigation secondaire ─────────────────────────────────────

.sidebar__nav--bottom {
  border-top: 1px solid var(--color-border);
  padding-top: 8px;
}

// ── Profil utilisateur ────────────────────────────────────────

.sidebar__user {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 10px;
  padding: 10px 8px;
  margin: 4px 8px 12px;
  border-radius: var(--radius-inner);
  border: 1px solid var(--color-border);
  background-color: var(--color-surface-lt);
  flex-shrink: 0;

  &--collapsed {
    justify-content: center;
    padding: 0;
    width: 40px;
    height: 40px;
    border: none;
    background: none;
    margin-inline: auto;
    margin-bottom: 12px;
  }
}

.sidebar__user-avatar {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  width: 30px;
  height: 30px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  background-color: var(--color-dark);
  color: var(--color-white);
  font-family: var(--font-medium);
  font-size: 11px;
  font-weight: 500;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}

.sidebar__user-info {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 1px;
  flex: 1;
  min-width: 0;
  overflow: hidden;
}

.sidebar__user-name {
  font-family: var(--font-medium);
  font-size: 12px;
  font-weight: 500;
  color: var(--color-dark);
  white-space: nowrap;
  overflow: hidden;
  text-overflow: ellipsis;
}

.sidebar__user-plan {
  font-size: 11px;
  color: var(--color-muted);
}

.sidebar__user-logout {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  width: 26px;
  height: 26px;
  border-radius: var(--radius-inner);
  background: none;
  border: none;
  cursor: pointer;
  color: var(--color-muted);
  flex-shrink: 0;
  transition: background-color 0.15s ease, color 0.15s ease;

  svg { width: 14px; height: 14px; }

  &:hover {
    background-color: var(--color-border);
    color: var(--color-dark);
  }

  &:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; }
}

.sidebar__logout-spinner {
  display: inline-block;
  width: 12px;
  height: 12px;
  border: 2px solid var(--color-border);
  border-top-color: var(--color-muted);
  border-radius: 50%;
  animation: shell-spin 0.7s linear infinite;
}

@keyframes shell-spin { to { transform: rotate(360deg); } }


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// ZONE PRINCIPALE
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

.shell__main {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  min-height: 100vh;
  min-width: 0;
  flex: 1;
  margin-left: $sidebar-w;
  transition: margin-left $speed $ease;

  .shell--collapsed & { margin-left: $sidebar-w-collapsed; }
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// TOPBAR
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

.topbar {
  position: sticky;
  top: 0;
  z-index: 40;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 8px;
  height: $topbar-h;
  padding: 0 24px;
  background-color: var(--color-white);
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--color-border);
  flex-shrink: 0;
}

// Burger mobile (masqué desktop)
.topbar__burger {
  display: none;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  width: 36px;
  height: 36px;
  border-radius: var(--radius-inner);
  background: none;
  border: none;
  cursor: pointer;
  color: var(--color-dark);
  flex-shrink: 0;

  svg { width: 18px; height: 18px; }
  &:hover { background-color: var(--color-surface-lt); }
}

// Bouton expand (sidebar collapsed, desktop)
.topbar__expand-btn {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  width: 28px;
  height: 28px;
  border-radius: var(--radius-inner);
  background: none;
  border: none;
  cursor: pointer;
  color: var(--color-muted);
  flex-shrink: 0;
  transition: background-color 0.15s ease, color 0.15s ease;

  svg { width: 14px; height: 14px; }

  &:hover {
    background-color: var(--color-surface-lt);
    color: var(--color-dark);
  }
}

// Breadcrumb
.topbar__breadcrumb {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 6px;
  flex: 1;
  min-width: 0;
  overflow: hidden;
}

.topbar__breadcrumb-sep {
  width: 10px;
  height: 10px;
  color: var(--color-border);
  flex-shrink: 0;
}

.topbar__breadcrumb-root {
  font-size: 13px;
  color: var(--color-muted);
  white-space: nowrap;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}

.topbar__breadcrumb-project {
  font-size: 13px;
  color: var(--color-muted);
  white-space: nowrap;
  overflow: hidden;
  text-overflow: ellipsis;
  max-width: 140px;
}

.topbar__breadcrumb-current {
  font-family: var(--font-medium);
  font-size: 13px;
  font-weight: 500;
  color: var(--color-dark);
  white-space: nowrap;
  overflow: hidden;
  text-overflow: ellipsis;
}

// Actions
.topbar__actions {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 8px;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}

.topbar__avatar {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  width: 32px;
  height: 32px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  background-color: var(--color-dark);
  color: var(--color-white);
  font-family: var(--font-medium);
  font-size: 11px;
  font-weight: 500;
  border: none;
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: opacity 0.15s ease;

  &:hover { opacity: 0.85; }
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// CONTENU
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

.shell__content {
  flex: 1;
  padding: 28px 24px;
  min-width: 0;
  overflow-x: hidden;
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// BACKDROP MOBILE
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

.sidebar-backdrop {
  position: fixed;
  inset: 0;
  background-color: rgba(20, 21, 26, 0.3);
  z-index: 40;
  backdrop-filter: blur(2px);
  animation: backdrop-in 0.2s ease;
}

@keyframes backdrop-in {
  from { opacity: 0; }
  to   { opacity: 1; }
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// RESPONSIVE
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

@media (max-width: 1023px) {
  .shell__main { margin-left: 0; }

  .sidebar {
    width: $sidebar-w;
    transform: translateX(-100%);
    transition: transform 0.25s cubic-bezier(0.32, 0.72, 0, 1);

    &--open {
      transform: translateX(0);
      box-shadow: 4px 0 24px rgba(20, 21, 26, 0.1);
    }
  }

  .shell--collapsed .sidebar { width: $sidebar-w; }
  .sidebar__collapse-btn     { display: none; }
  .topbar__expand-btn        { display: none; }
  .topbar__burger            { display: flex; }
}

@media (max-width: 767px) {
  .shell__content { padding: 20px 16px; }
  .topbar         { padding: 0 16px; }

  .topbar__breadcrumb-root,
  .topbar__breadcrumb-project,
  .topbar__breadcrumb-sep:first-of-type { display: none; }
}
```

# frontend\src\app\features\dashboard\shell\dashboard-shell.ts

```ts
import {
  Component, HostListener, inject,
  OnInit, signal, computed
} from '@angular/core';
import { CommonModule, TitleCasePipe } from '@angular/common';
import { Router, RouterLink, RouterLinkActive, RouterOutlet, NavigationEnd } from '@angular/router';
import { filter } from 'rxjs';
import { AuthService } from '../../../core/services/auth.service';
import { UserService } from '../../../core/services/user.service';
import { DashboardContextService } from '../../../core/services/dashboard-context.service';
import { BillingService, QuotaResult } from '../../../shared/components/billing/billing.service';
import { ProjectSwitcher } from '../../../shared/components/project-switcher/project-switcher';

interface NavItem {
  label: string;
  path: string;
  icon: string;
  badge?: number;
}

@Component({
  selector: 'app-dashboard-shell',
  standalone: true,
  imports: [CommonModule, TitleCasePipe, RouterLink, RouterLinkActive, RouterOutlet, ProjectSwitcher],
  templateUrl: './dashboard-shell.html',
  styleUrl: './dashboard-shell.scss',
})
export class DashboardShell implements OnInit {

  // ─── Services ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  private readonly auth = inject(AuthService);
  private readonly userService = inject(UserService);
  private readonly dashboardContext = inject(DashboardContextService);
  private readonly billingService = inject(BillingService);
  private readonly router = inject(Router);

  // ─── Signals exposés ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  readonly profile = this.userService.profile;
  readonly fullName = this.userService.fullName;
  readonly initials = this.userService.initials;
  readonly currentProject = this.dashboardContext.selectedProject;
  readonly currentPlan = this.dashboardContext.plan;

  sidebarCollapsed = signal(false);
  mobileMenuOpen = signal(false);
  logoutLoading = signal(false);
  quota = signal<QuotaResult | null>(null);
  currentUrl = signal('');

  // ─── Quota helpers ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  readonly quotaPercent = computed(() => {
    const q = this.quota();
    if (!q || q.feedbacksLimit <= 0) return 0;
    return Math.min(Math.round((q.usagePercent / q.feedbacksLimit) * 100), 100);
  });

  // ─── Label page courante (breadcrumb topbar) ──────────────────────────────
  readonly currentPageLabel = computed(() => {
    const url = this.currentUrl();
    const map: Record<string, string> = {
      '/dashboard': 'Vue d\'ensemble',
      '/dashboard/projects': 'Projets',
      '/dashboard/feedbacks': 'Feedbacks',
      '/dashboard/trends': 'Tendances',
      '/dashboard/widget': 'Widget',
      '/dashboard/settings': 'Paramètres',
      '/dashboard/help': 'Aide',
      '/dashboard/billing': 'Facturation',
    };
    // Correspondance exacte d'abord, puis par préfixe
    if (map[url]) return map[url];
    const match = Object.entries(map).find(([k]) => url.startsWith(k) && k !== '/dashboard');
    return match ? match[1] : 'Vue d\'ensemble';
  });

  // ─── Navigation principale ────────────────────────────────────────────────
  readonly navItems: NavItem[] = [
    { label: 'Vue d\'ensemble', path: '/dashboard', icon: 'home' },
    { label: 'Projets', path: '/dashboard/projects', icon: 'folder' },
    { label: 'Feedbacks', path: '/dashboard/feedbacks', icon: 'messages' },
    { label: 'Tendances', path: '/dashboard/trends', icon: 'chart' },
    { label: 'Widget', path: '/dashboard/widget', icon: 'code' },
  ];

  // ─── Navigation secondaire ────────────────────────────────────────────────
  readonly bottomNavItems: NavItem[] = [
    { label: 'Paramètres', path: '/dashboard/settings', icon: 'settings' },
    { label: 'Aide', path: '/dashboard/help', icon: 'help' },
    { label: 'Facturation', path: '/dashboard/billing', icon: 'billing' },
  ];

  // ─── Lifecycle ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  ngOnInit(): void {
    // Charger le quota
    this.billingService.getQuota().subscribe({
      next: quota => this.quota.set(quota),
      error: () => { /* silencieux */ }
    });

    // Suivre l'URL courante pour le breadcrumb
    this.currentUrl.set(this.router.url.split('?')[0]);
    this.router.events.pipe(
      filter(e => e instanceof NavigationEnd)
    ).subscribe(e => {
      this.currentUrl.set((e as NavigationEnd).urlAfterRedirects.split('?')[0]);
    });
  }

  // ─── Actions ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  logout(): void {
    if (this.logoutLoading()) return;
    this.logoutLoading.set(true);
    this.auth.logout();
  }

  toggleSidebar(): void {
    this.sidebarCollapsed.update(v => !v);
  }

  toggleMobileMenu(): void {
    this.mobileMenuOpen.update(v => !v);
    document.body.style.overflow = this.mobileMenuOpen() ? 'hidden' : '';
  }

  closeMobileMenu(): void {
    this.mobileMenuOpen.set(false);
    document.body.style.overflow = '';
  }

  // ─── Keyboard ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  @HostListener('window:keydown.escape')
  onEscape(): void { this.closeMobileMenu(); }
}
```

# frontend\src\app\features\dashboard\trends\trends.html

```html
<div class="trends">

  <!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
       PAYWALL — utilisateur Free
       ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
  @if (!isPro()) {
    <app-paywall
      [title]="'Analyse des tendances'"
      [subtitle]="'Les graphiques et insights IA sont disponibles à partir du plan'">
    </app-paywall>

  } @else {

    <!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
         HEADER
         ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
    <header class="trends__header">
      <div class="trends__header-left">
        <h1 class="trends__title">Tendances</h1>
        <p class="trends__subtitle">
          @if (currentProject()) {
            Analyse de <strong>{{ currentProject()!.name }}</strong>
          } @else {
            Analyse globale de tous vos projets
          }
        </p>
      </div>

      <div class="period-toggle" role="group" aria-label="Sélectionner la période">
        @for (p of periods; track p.value) {
          <button
            class="period-toggle__btn"
            [class.period-toggle__btn--active]="period() === p.value"
            [attr.aria-pressed]="period() === p.value"
            (click)="setPeriod(p.value)">
            {{ p.label }}
          </button>
        }
      </div>
    </header>

    <!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
         LOADING
         ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
    @if (loading()) {
      <div class="trends__loading" aria-busy="true" aria-label="Chargement">
        <div class="t-skel t-skel--kpi"></div>
        <div class="t-skel t-skel--insights"></div>
        <div class="t-skel t-skel--chart"></div>
        <div class="t-skel t-skel--breakdown"></div>
      </div>
    }

    <!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
         ERREUR
         ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
    @if (error()) {
      <div class="trends__error" role="alert">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none" stroke="currentColor"
             stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true">
          <circle cx="8" cy="8" r="7"/>
          <line x1="8" y1="5" x2="8" y2="8.5"/>
          <circle cx="8" cy="11" r="0.5" fill="currentColor"/>
        </svg>
        {{ error() }}
        <button class="trends__error-retry" (click)="load()">Réessayer</button>
      </div>
    }

    @if (!loading() && !error()) {

      <!-- ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
           EMPTY STATE — 0 feedbacks
           ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
      @if (!hasData()) {
        <div class="trends__empty">
          <div class="trends__empty-icon" aria-hidden="true">
            <svg viewBox="0 0 48 48" fill="none" stroke="currentColor"
                 stroke-width="1.2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
              <polyline points="6 36 18 22 26 30 36 14 42 20"/>
              <rect x="4" y="4" width="40" height="40" rx="4" stroke-dasharray="4 3"/>
            </svg>
          </div>
          <p class="trends__empty-title">Aucune donnée sur cette période</p>
          <p class="trends__empty-desc">
            Partagez votre widget client pour commencer à recevoir des feedbacks et voir vos tendances se dessiner.
          </p>
          <a routerLink="/dashboard/widget" class="trends__empty-cta">
            Configurer le widget →
          </a>
        </div>
      }

      @if (hasData()) {

        <!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
             KPI CARDS
             ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
        <section class="t-kpi" aria-label="Indicateurs clés">

          <div class="t-kpi-card">
            <span class="t-kpi-card__label">Total sur la période</span>
            <span class="t-kpi-card__value">{{ summary()?.totalPeriod ?? 0 }}</span>
            <div
              class="t-kpi-card__growth"
              [class.t-kpi-card__growth--up]="growthPositive()"
              [class.t-kpi-card__growth--down]="!growthPositive()">
              @if (growthPositive()) {
                <svg viewBox="0 0 14 14" fill="none" stroke="currentColor"
                     stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true">
                  <polyline points="1 10 5 5 9 7 13 2"/>
                </svg>
              } @else {
                <svg viewBox="0 0 14 14" fill="none" stroke="currentColor"
                     stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true">
                  <polyline points="1 4 5 9 9 7 13 12"/>
                </svg>
              }
              {{ growthLabel() }} vs période préc.
            </div>
          </div>

          <div class="t-kpi-card">
            <span class="t-kpi-card__label">Moyenne / jour</span>
            <span class="t-kpi-card__value">{{ summary()?.avgPerDay ?? 0 }}</span>
            <span class="t-kpi-card__sub">feedbacks par jour</span>
          </div>

          <div class="t-kpi-card t-kpi-card--peak">
            <span class="t-kpi-card__label">Pic de la période</span>
            <span class="t-kpi-card__value">{{ summary()?.peakCount ?? 0 }}</span>
            <span class="t-kpi-card__sub">{{ formatPeakDate(summary()?.peakDate ?? '') }}</span>
          </div>

          <div class="t-kpi-card">
            <span class="t-kpi-card__label">Période précédente</span>
            <span class="t-kpi-card__value">{{ summary()?.totalPrevious ?? 0 }}</span>
            <span class="t-kpi-card__sub">feedbacks</span>
          </div>

        </section>

        <!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
             AI INSIGHTS
             ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
        @if (aiInsights().length > 0) {
          <section class="t-insights" aria-label="Insights IA">

            <div class="t-insights__header">
              <span class="t-insights__label">
                <svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none" stroke="currentColor"
                     stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true">
                  <path d="M8 2l1.5 3 3.5.5-2.5 2.5.5 3.5L8 10l-3 1.5.5-3.5L3 5.5l3.5-.5L8 2z"/>
                </svg>
                Insights IA
              </span>
              <span class="t-insights__period">sur {{ period() }} jours</span>
            </div>

            <div class="t-insights__grid">
              @for (insight of aiInsights(); track insight.title) {
                <div class="t-insight-card t-insight-card--{{ insight.type }}">
                  <span class="t-insight-card__emoji" aria-hidden="true">{{ insight.emoji }}</span>
                  <div class="t-insight-card__body">
                    <p class="t-insight-card__title">{{ insight.title }}</p>
                    <p class="t-insight-card__desc">{{ insight.desc }}</p>
                  </div>
                </div>
              }
            </div>

          </section>
        }

        <!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
             GRAPHIQUE PRINCIPAL
             ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
        <section class="t-chart-section">

          <div class="t-chart-section__header">
            <h2 class="t-chart-section__title">Volume journalier</h2>

            <div class="t-chart-toggle" role="group" aria-label="Type de graphique">
              <button
                class="t-chart-toggle__btn"
                [class.t-chart-toggle__btn--active]="chartType() === 'bar'"
                [attr.aria-pressed]="chartType() === 'bar'"
                (click)="setChartType('bar')"
                title="Barres">
                <svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none" stroke="currentColor"
                     stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true">
                  <rect x="1" y="8"  width="4" height="7" rx="1"/>
                  <rect x="6" y="4"  width="4" height="11" rx="1"/>
                  <rect x="11" y="1" width="4" height="14" rx="1"/>
                </svg>
              </button>
              <button
                class="t-chart-toggle__btn"
                [class.t-chart-toggle__btn--active]="chartType() === 'line'"
                [attr.aria-pressed]="chartType() === 'line'"
                (click)="setChartType('line')"
                title="Courbe">
                <svg viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none" stroke="currentColor"
                     stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true">
                  <polyline points="1 12 5 7 9 9 15 3"/>
                </svg>
              </button>
            </div>
          </div>

          <!-- Graphique barres -->
          @if (chartType() === 'bar') {
            <div class="t-bar-chart">
              @if (volume().length === 0 || maxVolume() === 0) {
                <div class="t-chart-empty">Aucune donnée sur cette période.</div>
              } @else {
                <div class="t-bar-chart__bars">
                  @for (point of volume(); track trackByDate($index, point)) {
                    <div class="t-bar-chart__item">
                      <div class="t-bar-chart__bar-wrap">
                        <div
                          class="t-bar-chart__bar"
                          [style.height.%]="getBarHeight(point.count)"
                          [title]="point.date + ' : ' + point.count + ' feedback(s)'">
                          @if (point.count > 0 && volume().length <= 14) {
                            <span class="t-bar-chart__value">{{ point.count }}</span>
                          }
                        </div>
                      </div>
                      @if (showLabel($index)) {
                        <span class="t-bar-chart__label">{{ point.date | date:'dd/MM' }}</span>
                      }
                    </div>
                  }
                </div>
              }
            </div>
          }

          <!-- Graphique courbe SVG -->
          @if (chartType() === 'line') {
            <div class="t-line-chart">
              @if (volume().length === 0 || maxVolume() === 0) {
                <div class="t-chart-empty">Aucune donnée sur cette période.</div>
              } @else {
                <svg
                  class="t-line-chart__svg"
                  viewBox="0 0 600 160"
                  preserveAspectRatio="none"
                  xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
                  aria-hidden="true">
                  <defs>
                    <linearGradient id="trendAreaGrad" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
                      <stop offset="0%"   stop-color="#3B82F6" stop-opacity="0.2"/>
                      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#3B82F6" stop-opacity="0"/>
                    </linearGradient>
                  </defs>
                  <path [attr.d]="areaPath()" fill="url(#trendAreaGrad)"/>
                  <path
                    [attr.d]="linePath()"
                    fill="none"
                    stroke="#3B82F6"
                    stroke-width="2.5"
                    stroke-linecap="round"
                    stroke-linejoin="round"/>
                  @for (pt of linePoints(); track pt.date) {
                    <circle
                      [attr.cx]="pt.x" [attr.cy]="pt.y" r="4"
                      fill="white" stroke="#3B82F6" stroke-width="2">
                      <title>{{ pt.date | date:'dd/MM/yyyy' }} — {{ pt.count }} feedback(s)</title>
                    </circle>
                  }
                </svg>
                <div class="t-line-chart__labels">
                  @for (point of volume(); track point.date; let i = $index) {
                    @if (showLabel(i)) {
                      <span class="t-line-chart__label">{{ point.date | date:'dd/MM' }}</span>
                    }
                  }
                </div>
              }
            </div>
          }

        </section>

        <!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
             BREAKDOWNS
             ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
        <div class="t-breakdowns">

          <!-- Par catégorie -->
          <section class="t-breakdown-card">
            <h2 class="t-breakdown-card__title">Par catégorie</h2>
            @if (categories().length === 0) {
              <p class="t-breakdown-card__empty">Aucune donnée.</p>
            } @else {
              <div class="t-breakdown-list">
                @for (cat of categories(); track cat.category) {
                  <div class="t-breakdown-item">
                    <div class="t-breakdown-item__row">
                      <span class="t-breakdown-item__label">{{ getCategoryLabel(cat.category) }}</span>
                      <span class="t-breakdown-item__count">
                        {{ cat.count }}
                        <span class="t-breakdown-item__pct">{{ cat.percentage }}%</span>
                      </span>
                    </div>
                    <div class="t-breakdown-item__track">
                      <div
                        class="t-breakdown-item__fill"
                        [style.width.%]="cat.percentage"
                        [style.background]="getCategoryColor(cat.category)">
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                }
              </div>
            }
          </section>

          <!-- Par priorité -->
          <section class="t-breakdown-card">
            <h2 class="t-breakdown-card__title">Par priorité</h2>
            @if (priorities().length === 0) {
              <p class="t-breakdown-card__empty">Aucune donnée.</p>
            } @else {
              <div class="t-breakdown-list">
                @for (pri of priorities(); track pri.priority) {
                  <div class="t-breakdown-item">
                    <div class="t-breakdown-item__row">
                      <span class="t-breakdown-item__label">{{ getPriorityLabel(pri.priority) }}</span>
                      <span class="t-breakdown-item__count">
                        {{ pri.count }}
                        <span class="t-breakdown-item__pct">{{ pri.percentage }}%</span>
                      </span>
                    </div>
                    <div class="t-breakdown-item__track">
                      <div
                        class="t-breakdown-item__fill"
                        [style.width.%]="pri.percentage"
                        [style.background]="getPriorityColor(pri.priority)">
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                }
              </div>
            }
          </section>

        </div>

      }

    }

  }

</div>
```

# frontend\src\app\features\dashboard\trends\trends.scss

```scss
.trends {
  max-width: 960px;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 20px;
  animation: trends-in 0.25s ease both;

  @keyframes trends-in {
    from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(6px); }
    to   { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
  }
}

// ── Header ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

.trends__header {
  display: flex;
  align-items: flex-start;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: 16px;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
}

.trends__header-left { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; }

.trends__title {
  font-family: var(--font-base);
  font-size: 26px;
  font-weight: 400;
  color: var(--color-dark);
  margin: 0;
  line-height: 1.2;
}

.trends__subtitle {
  font-size: 14px;
  color: var(--color-muted);
  margin: 0;

  strong { color: var(--color-dark); font-family: var(--font-medium); }
}

// ── Toggle période ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

.period-toggle {
  display: flex;
  gap: 2px;
  padding: 3px;
  background-color: var(--color-surface-lt);
  border: 1px solid var(--color-border);
  border-radius: var(--radius-inner);
  flex-shrink: 0;
}

.period-toggle__btn {
  padding: 5px 14px;
  border-radius: calc(var(--radius-inner) - 2px);
  border: none;
  background: transparent;
  color: var(--color-muted);
  font-family: var(--font-medium);
  font-size: 12px;
  font-weight: 500;
  cursor: pointer;
  white-space: nowrap;
  transition: background-color 0.15s ease, color 0.15s ease, box-shadow 0.15s ease;

  &--active {
    background-color: var(--color-white);
    color: var(--color-dark);
    box-shadow: 0 1px 3px rgba(20, 21, 26, 0.08);
  }

  &:hover:not(.period-toggle__btn--active) { color: var(--color-dark); }
}

// ── Loading skeletons ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

.trends__loading {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 16px;
}

.t-skel {
  border-radius: var(--radius-card);
  background: linear-gradient(
    90deg,
    var(--color-surface-lt) 0%,
    var(--color-surface) 50%,
    var(--color-surface-lt) 100%
  );
  background-size: 200% 100%;
  animation: t-shimmer 1.4s ease infinite;

  &--kpi      { height: 88px; }
  &--insights { height: 72px; border-radius: var(--radius-inner); }
  &--chart    { height: 220px; }
  &--breakdown{ height: 160px; }
}

@keyframes t-shimmer {
  0%   { background-position: 200% 0; }
  100% { background-position: -200% 0; }
}

// ── Erreur ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

.trends__error {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 10px;
  padding: 12px 16px;
  border-radius: var(--radius-inner);
  background-color: #FFF1F2;
  border: 1px solid #FECDD3;
  font-size: 14px;
  color: #BE123C;

  svg { width: 16px; height: 16px; flex-shrink: 0; }
}

.trends__error-retry {
  margin-left: auto;
  padding: 4px 12px;
  border-radius: var(--radius-inner);
  border: 1px solid #FECDD3;
  background-color: var(--color-white);
  color: #BE123C;
  font-size: 12px;
  cursor: pointer;
  flex-shrink: 0;
  transition: background-color 0.15s ease;

  &:hover { background-color: #FFF1F2; }
}

// ── Empty state ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

.trends__empty {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  align-items: center;
  text-align: center;
  padding: 64px 24px;
  gap: 12px;
  background-color: var(--color-white);
  border: 1px solid var(--color-border);
  border-radius: var(--radius-card);
}

.trends__empty-icon {
  width: 56px;
  height: 56px;
  color: var(--color-muted);
  opacity: 0.35;
  margin-bottom: 4px;

  svg { width: 100%; height: 100%; }
}

.trends__empty-title {
  font-family: var(--font-medium);
  font-size: 15px;
  color: var(--color-dark);
  margin: 0;
}

.trends__empty-desc {
  font-size: 13px;
  color: var(--color-muted);
  margin: 0;
  max-width: 300px;
  line-height: 1.6;
}

.trends__empty-cta {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  margin-top: 8px;
  padding: 8px 18px;
  border-radius: var(--radius-inner);
  border: 1px solid var(--color-border);
  background-color: var(--color-white);
  font-family: var(--font-medium);
  font-size: 13px;
  color: var(--color-dark);
  text-decoration: none;
  transition: background-color 0.15s ease;

  &:hover { background-color: var(--color-surface-lt); }
}

// ── KPI Cards ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

.t-kpi {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
  gap: 12px;

  @media (max-width: 768px) { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); }
  @media (max-width: 480px) { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
}

.t-kpi-card {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 4px;
  padding: 16px;
  background-color: var(--color-white);
  border: 1px solid var(--color-border);
  border-radius: var(--radius-card);

  &--peak {
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #EFF6FF 0%, #F5F3FF 100%);
    border-color: #BFDBFE;
  }
}

.t-kpi-card__label {
  font-size: 11px;
  font-weight: 500;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.06em;
  color: var(--color-muted);
  margin: 0;
}

.t-kpi-card__value {
  font-family: var(--font-medium);
  font-size: 28px;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: var(--color-dark);
  line-height: 1;
  margin: 2px 0;
}

.t-kpi-card__sub {
  font-size: 12px;
  color: var(--color-muted);
}

.t-kpi-card__growth {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 4px;
  font-family: var(--font-medium);
  font-size: 12px;

  svg { width: 12px; height: 12px; flex-shrink: 0; }

  &--up   { color: #16A34A; }
  &--down { color: #DC2626; }
}

// ── Insights IA ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

.t-insights { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 10px; }

.t-insights__header {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: 8px;
}

.t-insights__label {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 6px;
  font-family: var(--font-medium);
  font-size: 11px;
  font-weight: 500;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.06em;
  color: var(--color-muted);

  svg { width: 13px; height: 13px; }
}

.t-insights__period {
  font-size: 11px;
  color: var(--color-muted);
}

.t-insights__grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(260px, 1fr));
  gap: 10px;
}

.t-insight-card {
  display: flex;
  align-items: flex-start;
  gap: 12px;
  padding: 14px 16px;
  border-radius: var(--radius-inner);
  border: 1px solid var(--color-border);
  background-color: var(--color-white);

  &--warning {
    background-color: #FFF7ED;
    border-color: #FED7AA;
  }
  &--success {
    background-color: #F0FDF4;
    border-color: #BBF7D0;
  }
  &--info {
    background-color: #EFF6FF;
    border-color: #BFDBFE;
  }
}

.t-insight-card__emoji {
  font-size: 20px;
  line-height: 1;
  flex-shrink: 0;
  margin-top: 1px;
}

.t-insight-card__body {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 3px;
  min-width: 0;
}

.t-insight-card__title {
  font-family: var(--font-medium);
  font-size: 13px;
  font-weight: 500;
  color: var(--color-dark);
  margin: 0;
}

.t-insight-card__desc {
  font-size: 12px;
  color: var(--color-muted);
  margin: 0;
  line-height: 1.55;
}

// ── Section graphique ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

.t-chart-section {
  background-color: var(--color-white);
  border: 1px solid var(--color-border);
  border-radius: var(--radius-card);
  padding: 20px 24px;
}

.t-chart-section__header {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  margin-bottom: 20px;
}

.t-chart-section__title {
  font-family: var(--font-medium);
  font-size: 14px;
  font-weight: 500;
  color: var(--color-dark);
  margin: 0;
}

// Toggle chart type
.t-chart-toggle {
  display: flex;
  gap: 2px;
  padding: 2px;
  background-color: var(--color-surface-lt);
  border: 1px solid var(--color-border);
  border-radius: var(--radius-inner);
}

.t-chart-toggle__btn {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  width: 30px;
  height: 30px;
  border-radius: calc(var(--radius-inner) - 2px);
  border: none;
  background: transparent;
  color: var(--color-muted);
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: background-color 0.15s ease, color 0.15s ease;

  svg { width: 14px; height: 14px; }

  &--active {
    background-color: var(--color-white);
    color: var(--color-dark);
    box-shadow: 0 1px 3px rgba(20, 21, 26, 0.08);
  }

  &:hover:not(.t-chart-toggle__btn--active) { color: var(--color-dark); }
}

// ── Graphique barres ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

.t-bar-chart { height: 180px; }

.t-bar-chart__bars {
  display: flex;
  align-items: flex-end;
  gap: 3px;
  height: 140px;
  padding-bottom: 24px;
  position: relative;
}

.t-bar-chart__item {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  align-items: center;
  flex: 1;
  height: 100%;
  gap: 4px;
}

.t-bar-chart__bar-wrap {
  display: flex;
  align-items: flex-end;
  flex: 1;
  width: 100%;
}

.t-bar-chart__bar {
  width: 100%;
  background-color: var(--color-dark);
  border-radius: 3px 3px 0 0;
  position: relative;
  min-height: 2px;
  transition: background-color 0.15s ease, opacity 0.15s ease;
  opacity: 0.7;
  cursor: default;

  &:hover { opacity: 1; }
}

.t-bar-chart__value {
  position: absolute;
  top: -18px;
  left: 50%;
  transform: translateX(-50%);
  font-size: 10px;
  color: var(--color-dark);
  white-space: nowrap;
  pointer-events: none;
}

.t-bar-chart__label {
  font-size: 10px;
  color: var(--color-muted);
  white-space: nowrap;
  text-align: center;
  margin-top: 4px;
}

.t-chart-empty {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  height: 140px;
  font-size: 13px;
  color: var(--color-muted);
}

// ── Graphique courbe ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

.t-line-chart { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; }

.t-line-chart__svg {
  width: 100%;
  height: 160px;
  display: block;
  overflow: visible;
}

.t-line-chart__labels {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
  padding: 0 2px;
}

.t-line-chart__label {
  font-size: 10px;
  color: var(--color-muted);
}

// ── Breakdowns ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

.t-breakdowns {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
  gap: 12px;

  @media (max-width: 640px) { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
}

.t-breakdown-card {
  background-color: var(--color-white);
  border: 1px solid var(--color-border);
  border-radius: var(--radius-card);
  padding: 20px;
}

.t-breakdown-card__title {
  font-family: var(--font-medium);
  font-size: 13px;
  font-weight: 500;
  color: var(--color-dark);
  margin: 0 0 16px;
}

.t-breakdown-card__empty {
  font-size: 13px;
  color: var(--color-muted);
  margin: 0;
}

.t-breakdown-list {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 12px;
}

.t-breakdown-item { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; }

.t-breakdown-item__row {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: 8px;
}

.t-breakdown-item__label {
  font-size: 13px;
  color: var(--color-dark);
  white-space: nowrap;
  overflow: hidden;
  text-overflow: ellipsis;
}

.t-breakdown-item__count {
  font-family: var(--font-medium);
  font-size: 13px;
  color: var(--color-dark);
  flex-shrink: 0;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 4px;
}

.t-breakdown-item__pct {
  font-size: 11px;
  color: var(--color-muted);
  font-family: var(--font-base);
}

.t-breakdown-item__track {
  height: 5px;
  background-color: var(--color-surface);
  border-radius: 3px;
  overflow: hidden;
}

.t-breakdown-item__fill {
  height: 100%;
  border-radius: 3px;
  transition: width 0.6s ease;
  min-width: 2px;
}
```

# frontend\src\app\features\dashboard\trends\trends.service.ts

```ts
import { Injectable, inject } from '@angular/core';
import { HttpClient, HttpParams } from '@angular/common/http';
import { Observable } from 'rxjs';
import { environment } from '../../../../environments/environment';
import { TrendsData } from './trends.types';

@Injectable({ providedIn: 'root' })
export class TrendsService {
  private readonly http = inject(HttpClient);
  private readonly API  = environment.apiUrl;

  get(days: number, projectId?: string): Observable<TrendsData> {
    let params = new HttpParams().set('days', days);
    if (projectId) params = params.set('projectId', projectId);

    return this.http.get<TrendsData>(
      `${this.API}/trends`,
      { params, withCredentials: true }
    );
  }
}
```
